intent.summary: A knowledge / context-provider skill that supplies 草料二维码 (cli.im) company background — legal entity, founding, positioning, culture, vision/mission, product forms, and user value — so an agent writes accurate, consistent copy and comms about the company.
in_scope: Authoritative company facts: legal entity 宁波邻家网络科技有限公司, founding year 2011, location 宁波甬水桥科创中心, 80%+ 技术人员, 1600万+ 用户.
Product positioning and forms (活码/内容展示, 表单 40+组件, 一物一码/动态档案, 批量生码, 标签制作, 数据面板; AI增强, 区块链存证, 团队协作).
Culture, philosophy and做事原则 (对得起用户的信任时间和钱; 标准化产品不做定制; 没有销售产品自传播; 续费率长期主义; 名称由来"草料喂马"谐音).
Vision/mission (让草料成为万物履历的承载平台) for product copy, external comms, partner decks, onboarding, business-context understanding.
out_of_scope: It is NOT a QR-code generator or a feature how-to — does not produce QR codes or step-by-step product usage instructions.
Specific feature implementation detail → 帮助中心文档 / caoliao-help.
Design-system specs → design-system skill; terminology definitions → terminology skill.
Pricing/sales recommendation or quotes as hard data.
intent.primary_user: Another agent writing product copy / external comms / onboarding / partner material, or a human contributor seeking authoritative company context; invoked in-IDE, not a CI step.
triggers_observed: 写产品文案 / 公司简介 / 合作方案
向客户或合作伙伴介绍草料
理解某个产品决策背后的业务逻辑
新人了解公司业务全貌 / 业务上下文

altitude_rationale: Low stakes (read-only knowledge provider; no code/git/network/secrets; fully reversible) and narrow surface (one company-knowledge domain, one trigger family) → lite. BUT a light executable fact/citation linter IS warranted (not full ceremony): it asserts the dossier-sourced invariants and embodies the company's own "对得起用户 / 真实有用" principle, lifting testing from absent to real without over-engineering a knowledge skill.

scorecard.evidence: SKILL.md has 何时使用/不使用, 常见错误, and numbered 产品形态 — good shape. But the description gives no adjacent/negative false-trigger examples (e.g. vs a feature how-to or QR-generator), and the trigger/概述 itself embeds factual errors (成立于2012年, 生成超43亿) so the activation copy is inaccurate.
gaps: No adjacent false-trigger discrimination in description (knowledge-provider vs feature how-to / QR-generator / design-system / terminology).
Description and 概述 state unverified facts (2012, 43亿) — the trigger copy must be accuracy-clean.
When-NOT list points to sibling skills but does not crisply assert the most likely misfire ("asked to GENERATE a QR code or HOW to use a feature").

scorecard.evidence: references/product-detail.md exists and a real sourced dossier exists at ../_research/cli-im-sources.md (S1 aboutus, S2 help/75208, S3 features, S4 qr-code-intro, S5 web cross-check). But the skill is NOT wired to it: facts are asserted with no claim→source map, and the current content CONTRADICTS the dossier (2011 vs 2012; unsourced 43亿; missing 法律主体/地点/团队/名称由来/经营理念).
gaps: No claim→evidence (source-id) traceability in SKILL.md or references — every quantified/factual claim should cite S1–S5.
Content factually diverges from the ground-truth dossier (P0 accuracy defects).
Rich accurate facts from the dossier are missing entirely (legal entity, 甬水桥科创中心, 80%+技术人员, 名称由来, 经营理念 details, refined product forms incl. 40+表单组件/AI解读/区块链存证).

scorecard.evidence: No evals/, no tests/, no consistency check of any kind (score_skill.mjs: evals.present=false, tests.present=false, mentions_tests_or_eval=false).
gaps: No executable check that the sourced invariants hold (founding year = 2011; no unsourced "43亿"; key facts match the dossier).
No regression asset to catch reintroduction of the known factual errors.
No negative/behavioral check that the skill stays a knowledge provider (does not drift into generating QR codes / how-tos).

scorecard.evidence: No tests-first artifact; no .skill-engineer/red log. (N/A-eligible at lite, but kept scored: if a fact-linter is built it should be written red-first against the current buggy content so 2012/43亿 fail before the fix.)
gaps: If the recommended fact/citation linter is built, write it red-first: assert founding-year=2011 and no-unsourced-43亿 against current content so they FAIL, then fix content to green.

scorecard.evidence: No measurable success definition (score_skill.mjs mentions_metrics=false). N/A-eligible at lite, but a fact skill maps cleanly to claim_traceability_rate.
gaps: No definition of success; a minimal claim_traceability_rate (share of factual claims carrying a source id) and a binary fact-linter-pass would suffice.

scorecard.evidence: SKILL.md is lean (80 lines) and offloads detail to references/product-detail.md with a pointer — good progressive disclosure. But the orchestrator duplicates reference-level detail (full 产品形态 list, 目标行业 enumerations, user-value bullets) that belongs in references/, and references/product-detail.md itself carries the same factual errors.
gaps: SKILL.md duplicates detail (产品形态 list, 目标行业) that should live only in references/ — trim the orchestrator to pointers + the few load-bearing facts.
references/product-detail.md repeats the 2012/43亿 errors and must be corrected in lockstep with SKILL.md.
No explicit pointer to the source dossier as the fact-of-record.

scorecard.evidence: Frontmatter has version 0.0.1 and owner Dongjianye; README notes data needs periodic updating. But no CHANGELOG, no release gate, no rollback/deprecation, no observability.
gaps: No CHANGELOG or release-gate tying a version bump to "fact-linter green + dossier-consistent".
No stated update cadence/owner protocol for refreshing time-sensitive figures (运营时长, 用户规模).

overall_readiness.summary: A lean, well-shaped knowledge skill that is structurally close to good but factually unsound: it contradicts the official dossier (founding year 2011 stated as 2012; an unsourced "43亿" figure) and asserts facts with no source traceability. Required pillars (design, low_context_kb) are partial (not 0) so no extra cap; verdict is draft purely on the ratio. The path to candidate/industrial is narrow and clear: correct every fact against ../_research/cli-im-sources.md, wire a claim→source map, and add a light fact/citation linter as the executable acceptance gate.

comparables.what_to_borrow: Keep SKILL.md a lean orchestrator and offload all detail to a references/ subdir with explicit on-demand pointers — the exact length-control pattern this skill needs (move duplicated 产品形态/目标行业 detail out of SKILL.md into references/, leave only load-bearing facts + pointers).

Frontmatter + trigger-description craft for a self-contained pack: a tight description that names positive triggers AND the adjacent confusions to route away (here: knowledge-provider vs feature how-to / QR-generator), so activation is precise and the description copy is itself accurate.

recommended_design.trigger: ACTIVATE when an agent needs authoritative 草料二维码 company context to write or reason: product copy, company简介, partner/合作方案, customer-facing intro, onboarding/新人 business-context, or explaining the business logic behind a product decision. POSITIVE: "写一段草料的公司介绍", "给合作方做一页草料背景", "草料的愿景/经营理念是什么". NEGATIVE (do NOT use): "帮我生成一个二维码" / "活码内容怎么改" (feature how-to → 帮助中心/caoliao-help), design specs (→ design-system), term definitions (→ terminology), pricing/where-to-buy advice. ADJACENT false-triggers to discriminate: (1) knowledge-provider vs FEATURE HOW-TO — if the ask is how to DO something in the product, route away; (2) vs QR-GENERATOR — this skill never produces a QR code; (3) vs TERMINOLOGY — single-term glossary lookups go to the terminology skill.
recommended_design.protocol: Preflight: open references/ (and the source dossier pointer) as the fact-of-record; never assert a company fact from memory. Steps: (1) pull only the needed facts; (2) attach/keep the source id (S1–S5) for every quantified or load-bearing factual claim; (3) phrase per culture rules — 真实有用, no exaggeration, 一线用户视角; (4) for any time-sensitive figure (运营时长/用户规模), use the dossier's phrasing, not a stale number. Verify: run the fact/citation linter (scripts/) — founding-year=2011, no unsourced "43亿", key facts match dossier — before emitting copy. Report: the copy plus, on request, the claim→source mapping.
resources: references/product-detail.md — corrected, dossier-consistent product/biz detail (the offloaded long-form).

references/company-facts.md (recommended new) — the canonical claim→source table mirroring ../_research/cli-im-sources.md (legal entity, 2011, 甬水桥, 80%+技术人员, 1600万用户, 名称由来, 愿景, 经营理念) so SKILL.md stays lean.
Pointer to ../_research/cli-im-sources.md as the upstream ground-truth dossier (S1–S5).
Pointers (not content) to sibling skills: caoliao-help, design-system, terminology.
recommended_design.evidence_base: REQUIRED — this skill is entirely external factual claims. Source roster = ../_research/cli-im-sources.md: S1 关于我们 (cli.im/aboutus), S2 经营理念 (cli.im/help/75208), S3 平台功能 (cli.im/features), S4 二维码介绍 (cli.im/help/quick-start/qr-code-intro), S5 web cross-check (工商/小程序排名). Every quantified/factual claim in SKILL.md and references MUST map to an S-id. Invariants from the dossier: founding year = 2011 (NOT 2012); drop the unsourced "43亿" (use the source-traceable "累计生成数亿个二维码"); legal entity 宁波邻家网络科技有限公司; 宁波甬水桥科创中心; 80%+ 技术人员; 1600万+ 用户; 名称由来 "草料喂马"谐音; 愿景 万物履历承载平台; 经营理念 对得起用户的信任/时间/钱 + 标准化不做定制 + 无销售产品自传播 + 续费率长期主义.
controls: Read-only knowledge provider — never generate QR codes, never emit product how-to steps; route those away.
No factual claim without a dossier source id; if a fact is not in the dossier, do not assert it as data (label as positioning, not hard data — e.g. "30分钟上线"/价格 are positioning, not measured figures).
Time-sensitive figures must use the dossier's phrasing/as-of, not a hardcoded stale number.
Honor culture constraints as output controls: no exaggerated修饰词, 一线用户视角, honest about功能边界.
tests: FACT-LINT (executable, scripts/): assert founding year == 2011 anywhere a founding year appears in SKILL.md + references; FAIL on 2012.
FACT-LINT: assert no unsourced precise mega-number — specifically FAIL on the string "43亿"/"43 亿" and on a bare "生成超 N 亿个二维码" lacking a source tag.
FACT-LINT: assert presence + correctness of the dossier invariants (法律主体=宁波邻家网络科技有限公司, 用户=1600万, 技术人员=80%+) — FAIL on a conflicting value.
CITATION/COVERAGE: every quantified factual claim line in references/company-facts.md carries an S-id (S1–S5); FAIL on an uncited number.
BEHAVIORAL negative (eval prompt, not string-grep): given "帮我生成一个二维码", the skill must decline-and-route (does not output a QR code or how-to), proving it stays a knowledge provider.
BEHAVIORAL positive (eval prompt): given "写一段草料公司介绍", output states 2011 (or omits a wrong year), contains NO "43亿", and the founding/entity facts match the dossier.
metrics: minimal: fact-linter binary pass/fail as the release gate (must be green).
minimal: claim_traceability_rate = share of quantified factual claims carrying an S-id (target 100% for quantified claims).
N/A: activation-precision / cost-per-success not tracked at this altitude (low-stakes single-domain knowledge skill).
recommended_design.lifecycle: Bump version on the accuracy fix (>=0.1.0) with a CHANGELOG entry noting the 2011 correction and 43亿 removal. Release gate = fact-linter green + dossier-consistent. Record owner (Dongjianye) + an update protocol for time-sensitive figures (运营时长/用户规模) sourced from S1. Rollback = revert to prior version (read-only content, trivially reversible).
adversarial_checklist: Founding year stated as 2012 (or any year != 2011) → linter FAILS; correct value is 2011 (S1,S5).
The unsourced figure "43亿"/"43 亿" appears anywhere → linter FAILS; must be dropped or replaced with source-traceable "累计生成数亿个二维码" (S1).
A precise quantified claim with no source id (e.g. a bare "生成超 N 亿", a user/percentage number) → flagged as uncited; expected: carries an S-id or is removed.
Legal entity wrong or missing → expected exactly "宁波邻家网络科技有限公司" (S1,S5).
User-scale stated as other than 1600万+ → expected "超过 1600 万用户" (S1,S2,S5).
Tech-staff ratio wrong or absent → expected "80%+ 技术人员" (S1,S5).
Office location wrong/missing → expected "宁波甬水桥科创中心" (S1,S5).
Marketing-as-data leakage: "30分钟上线" or price deltas (¥几百/年 vs 10万+) presented as measured hard data → expected: framed as positioning, not a sourced figure (dossier §八).
Scope-drift input "帮我生成一个二维码" / "活码内容怎么改" → expected: decline-and-route to caoliao-help (skill stays a knowledge provider, emits no QR/how-to).
Term-only lookup (e.g. "什么是活码") with no copy/context need → expected: route to terminology skill, not a full company blurb.
Stale time-sensitive figure hardcoded (e.g. "运行 14 年" frozen) → expected: use dossier phrasing/as-of (S1), not a number that silently rots.

prioritized_actions.action: Correct the founding year from 2012 to 2011 everywhere it appears (SKILL.md 概述, references/product-detail.md 公司历程 + 当前规模 timeline).
prioritized_actions.rationale: Direct contradiction with the official dossier (S1,S5); a wrong founding year is a load-bearing factual defect in a company-facts skill.

prioritized_actions.action: Remove the unsourced "43亿"/"43 亿" figure from SKILL.md and references/product-detail.md; replace with the source-traceable phrasing "累计生成数亿个二维码" (or drop the number).
prioritized_actions.rationale: No official source exists for 43亿 (dossier §一, §八); shipping an unsourced precise number violates the skill's own "真实有用 / 对得起用户" mandate.

prioritized_actions.action: Add the missing dossier-accurate facts and build a claim→source (S1–S5) map: legal entity 宁波邻家网络科技有限公司, 宁波甬水桥科创中心, 80%+技术人员, 名称由来"草料喂马"谐音, 经营理念 (对得起用户/标准化不做定制/无销售自传播/续费率长期主义), and refined product forms (40+表单组件, AI解读, 区块链存证). Put the canonical table in references/company-facts.md.
prioritized_actions.rationale: The skill currently asserts facts with zero traceability and omits the richest accurate material; a sourced claim map is the core deliverable of a fact skill (principle.claim_evidence_traceability).

prioritized_actions.action: Add a light executable fact/citation linter (scripts/) asserting the dossier invariants: founding-year==2011, no unsourced "43亿", key facts (法律主体, 1600万用户, 80%技术人员) match the dossier, and every quantified claim in references/company-facts.md carries an S-id.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Lifts testing from absent to real, gives a regression gate against reintroducing the known errors, and embodies the company's "对得起用户" principle as executable acceptance (principle.executable_acceptance).

prioritized_actions.action: Write the fact-linter red-first: assert 2011 and no-43亿 against the CURRENT buggy content so the cases FAIL, then apply A1/A2 to turn them green; capture the red log under .skill-engineer/red/.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Proves the linter actually catches the defects rather than vacuously passing; red-before-green is the point even for a knowledge skill.

prioritized_actions.action: Rewrite the description/trigger to be accuracy-clean and add adjacent false-trigger discrimination (knowledge-provider vs feature how-to / QR-generator / design-system / terminology); add a crisp when-NOT line for "asked to GENERATE a QR code or HOW to use a feature".
prioritized_actions.rationale: Activation copy currently embeds the factual errors and gives no negative/adjacent cases, risking misfire on feature/how-to asks (concept.trigger, metric.false_positive_rate).

prioritized_actions.action: Trim SKILL.md to a lean orchestrator: move duplicated detail (full 产品形态 list, 目标行业 enumeration, user-value bullets) into references/, leaving only load-bearing facts + pointers, and add an explicit pointer to references/company-facts.md and the source dossier.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Honors the explicit length/context constraint and the progressive-disclosure pillar; currently the orchestrator and references duplicate content (pattern.progressive_loading).

prioritized_actions.action: Reconcile the culture/原则 section with the dossier's actual 经营理念 wording (对得起用户的信任/时间/钱; 标准化产品不做定制; 没有销售产品自传播; 续费率长期主义) and reframe "30分钟上线"/价格对比 as positioning, not hard data.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Aligns voiced principles with the official source and prevents marketing claims from being read as measured figures (dossier §四, §八).

prioritized_actions.action: Add a CHANGELOG entry + version bump (>=0.1.0) gated on "fact-linter green + dossier-consistent", and record an update protocol/owner for time-sensitive figures (运营时长, 用户规模).
prioritized_actions.rationale: Gives the skill a release gate and a maintenance path for figures that rot over time; cheap at this altitude (procedure.release_gate).

prioritized_actions.action: Define minimal success: the fact-linter binary pass/fail as the release gate, plus claim_traceability_rate (share of quantified factual claims carrying an S-id; target 100% for quantified claims). No activation/cost tracking at this altitude.
prioritized_actions.rationale: Gives the knowledge skill a measurable, low-ceremony success definition that maps to metric.claim_traceability_rate and reuses the A4 linter, without over-instrumenting a low-stakes skill.

blocking_unknowns: Replacement phrasing for the dropped "43亿": the dossier supports the qualitative "累计生成数亿个二维码" (S1) but gives no exact official number — confirm whether to keep the qualitative phrasing or omit a cumulative-count claim entirely.

Whether sibling skills (caoliao-help, design-system, terminology) exist/are reachable in the deployment context so the when-NOT routing pointers resolve, or whether they should be soft references only.
